overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city. The journey begins along a waterfront promenade with distinctive red monorail tracks, progresses through covered walkways beneath elevated highways, and culminates at a busy intersection surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with red monorail structure

events.description: moves from waterfront viewing area onto pedestrian crosswalk with green walk markings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade approaching a crosswalk

notable_agents.action: man in red jacket walking toward camera across the crosswalk

entered.detail: curved red elevated train track structure extending over the water
body of water running alongside the pedestrian walkway
blue metal railing separating walkway from water
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing with green walk symbols

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic waterfront promenade with a distinctive red monorail track curving overhead. The camera follows a character walking forward along the concrete path, passing other pedestrians and approaching a marked crosswalk. The water canal remains visible to the right, bordered by a metal railing, while towering glass buildings rise in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with palm trees and elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking along the city sidewalk passing palm trees and street vendors

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the sidewalk edge
massive concrete and steel overpass structure with red support beams
tall modern street lamps along the pedestrian path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open city street lined with palm trees, moving away from the waterfront. The elevated highway structure looms ahead, casting shadows on the road. Vehicles pass by on the left while pedestrians walk along the wide sidewalk, and futuristic buildings with large advertisements rise on both sides of the street.

events.description: enters the shadow of the massive concrete overpass, significantly darkening the scene

agents.ego_description: walking under the dark concrete overpass with neon lights reflecting off surfaces

entered.detail: underside of the massive highway structure with visible support beams and green neon strip lighting
thick concrete columns holding up the elevated roadway

segments.scene_description: The character moves beneath the elevated highway into a dimly lit, semi-enclosed space. The concrete ceiling and support pillars dominate the view overhead, while green neon strip lights run along the structure's underside. The environment shifts from bright daylight to shadowy artificial lighting as the walkway continues alongside the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront walkway with neon lighting

events.description: emerges from dark underpass into covered walkway with colorful neon ceiling lights

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered promenade passing other pedestrians under shifting colored lights

notable_agents.action: woman in blue top walking ahead of the camera

entered.detail: overhead structure with translucent panels and colored neon lighting that shifts from green to yellow to red
transparent safety barrier along the water's edge
large glowing digital billboards and holographic displays on building facades

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dark underpass, the scene transitions to a covered waterfront walkway illuminated by shifting neon lights overhead. The glass railing reveals the water below while holographic advertisements glow on distant buildings. The ceiling panels cycle through green, yellow, and red hues, casting colored reflections on the tiled walkway as pedestrians move through the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with towering neon skyscrapers

events.description: exits covered walkway into open intersection with heavy pedestrian and vehicle traffic
crosses the intersection while futuristic vehicles pass through the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the busy intersection while looking up at the towering skyscrapers and holographic displays

notable_agents.action: white futuristic sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: massive skyscrapers covered in bright neon signage and digital displays reaching into the sky
wide pedestrian crossing with red grid markings on the asphalt
futuristic traffic signs and directional markers

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a vast, sunlit intersection surrounded by colossal neon-lit skyscrapers. The character crosses the red-marked crosswalk amidst a dense crowd of pedestrians while futuristic vehicles navigate the intersection. The camera pans upward to reveal the full height of the towering buildings covered in massive holographic advertisements, emphasizing the vertical scale of the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright waterfront promenade through a series of shadowed urban underpasses and into a towering, neon-lit city center. It begins by following a character along a concrete path beneath a curving red monorail track, moving away from the water and past palm trees toward a looming elevated highway. As the character passes under the highway, the environment shifts from bright daylight to a dimly lit space dominated by concrete pillars and green neon strip lights. The scene then opens into a covered walkway where the ceiling panels cycle through shifting hues of green, yellow, and red, casting colorful reflections on the tiles before the path emerges into a vast, sunlit intersection. Finally, the camera pans upward from the crowded crosswalk to reveal the colossal scale of skyscrapers draped in massive holographic advertisements.
